emails.subject: Bank of America
emails.body: Tana: Please let me know if you did anything with this or I will assign. Since you were copied, I didn't know if you had a conversation with Tanya or Soma. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 12/11/2000 08:14 AM Tanya Rohauer 12/06/2000 08:19 PM

emails.subject: Re: Bank of America
emails.body: Re: Bank of America I haven't done anything. I was waiting for you to get back in to discuss this... Sara Shackleton 12/11/2000 08:16 AM

emails.subject: Bank of America
emails.body: Bank of America Attached is my proposed form of Amendment, which would delete the old style "ERMS" Collateral Annex and replace it with an ISDA Credit Support Annex. Tanya, please take a look at the stairstep, and the segregation of collateral provisions.
